body_excerpt: In btm_ble_periodic_adv_sync_tx_rcvd of btm_ble_gap.cc, there is a possible out of bounds read due to an incorrect bounds check. This could lead to local information disclosure over Bluetooth, if the firmware were compromised with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
